nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for data analysis
nodes.label_negative: AI as requiring manual preparation and oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I believe AI should be used for efficiency

nodes.label: AI specificity and data preparation
nodes.label_negative: AI confusion with large or unspecific data
nodes.grounding_span: the more specific the data, the easier time Gemini has

nodes.label: AI understanding of user intent
nodes.label_negative: AI misunderstanding or getting stuck in loops
nodes.grounding_span: it is not understanding my prompt or vision

nodes.label: AI use for sensitive data
nodes.grounding_span: Any sensitive customer data has to be manually ran or removed before uploading

nodes.label: AI automation freeing time for human collaboration
nodes.label_negative: AI taking over all tasks without human collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: automate as much as I possibly can to allow us to focus on other things that AI cannot handle, such as collaboration

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: the overall time savings is worth the try

nodes.label: Data accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: Find any anomalies between these two sets of data

nodes.label: Human collaboration and team interaction
nodes.grounding_span: focus on other things that AI cannot handle, such as collaboration with other teams

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time savings
nodes.grounding_span: the majority of the time I am satisfied

nodes.label: Frustration when AI misunderstands
nodes.grounding_span: it is not understanding my prompt or vision

nodes.label: Proactive embrace of AI future
nodes.grounding_span: AI is the future, whether thats automation or simplification

nodes.label: Cautious boundary around sensitive data
nodes.grounding_span: Any sensitive customer data has to be manually ran or removed before uploading

nodes.label: Iterative refinement of data preparation
nodes.grounding_span: I've slowly found that the more direct I am with the data (a smaller dataset), Gemini has an easier time

nodes.label: Systematic task decomposition into specific prompts
nodes.grounding_span: The prompts vary depending on which type of data I'm looking at
